title: ResizePotions
description: This data pack adds potions with which you can become smaller or larger!
body:
This data pack adds a recipe for new potions that can decrease and increase the player’s height. Potions can increase height by a maximum of 2 times or reduce it to 0.25. 

---

If you drink

1 potion of increase - height will be **1.5**\
2 potions of increase - growth will be **2**\
3 potions of increase - growth will be **2**, but to return to normal size you will need to drink 3 potions

---

1 potions of decrease - growth will be **0.5**\
2 potions of decrease - growth will be **0.25**\
3 potions of decrease - growth will be **0.25**, but to return to normal size you will need to drink 3 potions.

---

command for obtaining recipes and potion ingredients - **/function soupdata:player/giveingredients**

command for getting potions - **/function soupdata:player/giveplayerpotions**

---

you can write **"/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar sizeAD21"** to find out the player's height from -2 to 2, where 0 is normal size (x), -2 = 0.25x, 2 = 2x
